achievements.title: Let's Go Rescue Sandy!
achievements.description: Find your way inside the Maniac Mansion.

achievements.title: A Door With No Knob
achievements.description: Find a way into the basement and turn on the light.

achievements.title: All-Purpose Equipment
achievements.description: Get the tools.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Handy Man
achievements.description: Fix the phone.

achievements.title: Stargazer
achievements.description: Enter the observatory.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Stethoscope Or Telescope
achievements.description: Open the wall-safe and thieve its contents.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: What A Hunk!
achievements.description: Get buff with the 'Hunk-O-Matic Machine' [TM].
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Radio Head
achievements.description: Fix the short-wave radio.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Only Game Worth Playing
achievements.description: Play Meteor Mess.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Garage-Be-Gone
achievements.description: Start the Weird Edsel.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Resource Efficiency
achievements.description: Satisfy the Green Tentacle by giving him his favorite food.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Gone Full Green
achievements.description: Satisfy the Green Tentacle without his favorite food.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Helping Out The Little Guy
achievements.description: Get a recording contract for the Green Tentacle.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Going Commando
achievements.description: Help Weird Ed with his plans.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Important Business
achievements.description: Get past the Purple Tentacle with a great deal.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Don't Bug Me, Sucker-Face!
achievements.description: Get past the Purple Tentacle using your authority.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Don't Be A Tuna Head!
achievements.description: Finish the game with Dave dead. [Any ending except 'famous']
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Arrested Developments
achievements.description: Finish the game with the 'police' ending.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: The Final Frontier
achievements.description: Finish the game with the 'space' ending.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Complete And Utter Defeat
achievements.description: Finish the game with the 'plant' ending.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: A Rock's Redemption
achievements.description: Finish the game with the 'famous' ending.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Cruel Fate
achievements.description: Finish the game with the 'famous' ending, after alerting the authorities.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Ed's Best Friend
achievements.description: Murder the innocent, claim their remains. Totally Awesome!
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Big Break
achievements.description: Get a recording contract for one of the kids.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE
achievements.description: Cause long distance destruction with the casette tape.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Disaster Averted
achievements.description: Return Ed's friend in top condition.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Escape Artist
achievements.description: Escape the dungeon without using the key.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Ah, Product Placement!
achievements.description: Collect a refreshing, ice cold can of Pepsi from a Pepsi machine.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Fumigated
achievements.description: Meet death through breathing radioactive steam.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Lights Out
achievements.description: Suffer a catastrophic nuclear meltdown via power overload.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Pool's Closed... Forever
achievements.description: Suffer a catastrophic nuclear meltdown via pool-related shenanigans.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Some Days You Just Can't Get Rid Of A Meteor
achievements.description: Suffer a catastrophic nuclear meltdown via self destruct.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Taking Things Too Far
achievements.description: Ed doesn't take too kindly to murderers. Argh!
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Wrath Of The Green Tentacle
achievements.description: Get the Green Tentacle to kill you out of jealousy.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Protected Copy Protection
achievements.description: Use the invisible keypad.
achievements.author: Dexterspet

achievements.title: Hope You Like Purple
achievements.description: All the kids have died. The rescue attempt failed.
achievements.author: Dexterspet
